title: [BUG] Last cell doesn't get returned in the array if it's empty
author: BENLKAMLENourdine

comments.author: kiba-d
kmorte
comments.body:
I encountered the same bug. How did you fix it? I don't quite understant what you did.
sheet.columns returns a number suposedly

comments.author: sukharev-deel
comments.body: any resolution to this BUG WHICH TOOK ME AGES TO FIND?

comments.author: sukharev-deel
gabrielsaviank
JonathanLangton1
ethyaan
sulo1337
comments.body:
> I faced the same bug. I also noticed that in such case` sheet.columnCount` returns right value. Also, I noticed that `eachRow` starts work correctly, If I call the next code before
> 
> ```
>     sheet.columns.forEach(c => {
>         c.eachCell?.({ includeEmpty: true }, cell => {
>           //OD NOTHING
>         })
>     })
>    sheet.getRow(2).eachCell({includeEmpty: true}, (cell, colNumber) => {
>     //NOW EVERY CELL IS PRESENT
>   })
> ```

For anyone still facing this issue, this workaround worked for me.
